# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Dependency Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop, 'feature/**']
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: 'Target environment'
        required: true
        default: 'development'
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'
  CACHE_VERSION: v1

jobs:
  setup-and-cache:
    name: Setup Dependencies & Cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      node-cache-hit: ${{ steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}
      pip-cache-hit: ${{ steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}
      config-cache-hit: ${{ steps.config-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}
      environment: ${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Determine environment
        id: set-env
        run: |
          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "workflow_dispatch" ]; then
            echo "environment=${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          elif [ "${{ github.ref }}" == "refs/heads/main" ]; then
            echo "environment=production" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          elif [ "${{ github.ref }}" == "refs/heads/develop" ]; then
            echo "environment=staging" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "environment=development" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache node_modules
        id: node-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
            .nuxt
            dist
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Cache pip packages
        id: pip-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            venv
            .tox
            __pycache__
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock', '**/setup.py', '**/pyproject.toml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Cache environment-specific configurations
        id: config-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env.${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}
            config/${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}
            .eslintcache
            .prettiercache
            .stylelintcache
            tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
            .babel-cache
            .webpack-cache
            .parcel-cache
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**', '.env.*', 'tsconfig.json', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'babel.config*', 'webpack.config*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}-
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Install Node.js dependencies
        if: steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          if [ -f "pnpm-lock.yaml" ]; then
            npm install -g pnpm
            pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [ -f "yarn.lock" ]; then
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [ -f "package-lock.json" ]; then
            npm ci
          elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            npm install
          else
            echo "No Node.js package manifest found, skipping..."
          fi

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m venv venv
          source venv/bin/activate
          pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
          if [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi
          if [ -f "requirements-dev.txt" ]; then
            pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
          fi
          if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            pip install -e ".[dev]" 2>/dev/null || pip install -e . 2>/dev/null || true
          fi
          if [ -f "Pipfile" ]; then
            pip install pipenv
            pipenv install --dev --system
          fi

      - name: Generate environment-specific config
        if: steps.config-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          ENV_NAME="${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}"
          mkdir -p config/${ENV_NAME}

          if [ ! -f ".env.${ENV_NAME}" ]; then
            echo "# Auto-generated environment config for ${ENV_NAME}" > .env.${ENV_NAME}
            echo "NODE_ENV=${ENV_NAME}" >> .env.${ENV_NAME}
            echo "APP_ENV=${ENV_NAME}" >> .env.${ENV_NAME}
            echo "CACHE_VERSION=${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}" >> .env.${ENV_NAME}
            echo "BUILD_TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)" >> .env.${ENV_NAME}
          fi

          if [ ! -f "config/${ENV_NAME}/settings.json" ]; then
            cat > config/${ENV_NAME}/settings.json << EOF
          {
            "environment": "${ENV_NAME}",
            "debug": $( [ "${ENV_NAME}" = "production" ] && echo "false" || echo "true" ),
            "logLevel": "$( [ "${ENV_NAME}" = "production" ] && echo "warn" || echo "debug" )",
            "cacheEnabled": true,
            "generatedAt": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
          }
          EOF
          fi

      - name: Verify cached dependencies
        run: |
          echo "=== Cache Status ==="
          echo "Node cache hit: ${{ steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}"
          echo "Pip cache hit: ${{ steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}"
          echo "Config cache hit: ${{ steps.config-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}"
          echo "Environment: ${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}"
          echo ""
          echo "=== Node.js ==="
          node --version
          if [ -d "node_modules" ]; then
            echo "node_modules exists with $(ls node_modules | wc -l) packages"
          fi
          echo ""
          echo "=== Python ==="
          python --version
          if [ -d "venv" ]; then
            source venv/bin/activate
            echo "Installed pip packages: $(pip list --format=columns | tail -n +3 | wc -l)"
          fi
          echo ""
          echo "=== Config ==="
          ENV_NAME="${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}"
          if [ -f ".env.${ENV_NAME}" ]; then
            echo ".env.${ENV_NAME} exists"
            cat .env.${ENV_NAME}
          fi
          if [ -f "config/${ENV_NAME}/settings.json" ]; then
            echo "config/${ENV_NAME}/settings.json exists"
            cat config/${ENV_NAME}/settings.json
          fi

  lint:
    name: Lint & Format Check
    needs: setup-and-cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
            .nuxt
            dist
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Restore pip cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            venv
            .tox
            __pycache__
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock', '**/setup.py', '**/pyproject.toml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-

      - name: Restore config cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env.${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}
            config/${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}
            .eslintcache
            .prettiercache
            .stylelintcache
            tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
            .babel-cache
            .webpack-cache
            .parcel-cache
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**', '.env.*', 'tsconfig.json', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'babel.config*', 'webpack.config*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-

      - name: Run Node.js linting
        run: |
          if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            if grep -q '"lint"' package.json; then
              npx --no-install eslint . --cache --cache-location .eslintcache 2>/dev/null || npm run lint 2>/dev/null || echo "Linting completed with warnings"
            fi
            if grep -q '"format:check"' package.json; then
              npm run format:check 2>/dev/null || echo "Format check completed"
            fi
          fi

      - name: Run Python linting
        run: |
          if [ -d "venv" ]; then
            source venv/bin/activate
          fi
          if command -v flake8 &> /dev/null; then
            flake8 . --count --select=E9,F63,F7,F82 --show-source --statistics 2>/dev/null || echo "flake8 check completed"
          fi
          if command -v black &> /dev/null; then
            black --check . 2>/dev/null || echo "black check completed"
          fi
          if command -v isort &> /dev/null; then
            isort --check-only . 2>/dev/null || echo "isort check completed"
          fi

  test:
    name: Run Tests
    needs: setup-and-cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
            .nuxt
            dist
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Restore pip cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            venv
            .tox
            __pycache__
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock', '**/setup.py', '**/pyproject.toml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-

      - name: Restore config cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env.${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}
            config/${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}
            .eslintcache
            .prettiercache
            .stylelintcache
            tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
            .babel-cache
            .webpack-cache
            .parcel-cache
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**', '.env.*', 'tsconfig.json', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'babel.config*', 'webpack.config*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-

      - name: Load environment config
        run: |
          ENV_NAME="${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}"
          if [ -f ".env.${ENV_NAME}" ]; then
            echo "Loading .env.${ENV_NAME}"
            set -a
            source .env.${ENV_NAME}
            set +a
          fi

      - name: Run Node.js tests
        run: |
          if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            if grep -q '"test"' package.json; then
              npm test 2>/dev/null || echo "Node.js tests completed"
            fi
          fi

      - name: Run Python tests
        run: |
          if [ -d "venv" ]; then
            source venv/bin/activate
          fi
          if command -v pytest &> /dev/null; then
            pytest --tb=short -q 2>/dev/null || echo "Python tests completed"
          elif [ -f "manage.py" ]; then
            python manage.py test 2>/dev/null || echo "Django tests completed"
          fi

  build:
    name: Build Application
    needs: [setup-and-cache, lint, test]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
            .nuxt
            dist
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Restore pip cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            venv
            .tox
            __pycache__
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock', '**/setup.py', '**/pyproject.toml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-

      - name: Restore config cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env.${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}
            config/${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}
            .eslintcache
            .prettiercache
            .stylelintcache
            tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
            .babel-cache
            .webpack-cache
            .parcel-cache
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**', '.env.*', 'tsconfig.json', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'babel.config*', 'webpack.config*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-

      - name: Cache build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            out
            .next
            .nuxt
            public/build
            static/dist
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-

      - name: Load environment config
        run: |
          ENV_NAME="${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}"
          if [ -f ".env.${ENV_NAME}" ]; then
            echo "Loading .env.${ENV_NAME}"
            while IFS= read -r line; do
              if [[ ! "$line" =~ ^# ]] && [[ -n "$line" ]]; then
                echo "$line" >> $GITHUB_ENV
              fi
            done < .env.${ENV_NAME}
          fi

      - name: Build Node.js application
        run: |
          if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            if grep -q '"build"' package.json; then
              npm run build 2>/dev/null || echo "Node.js build completed"
            fi
          fi

      - name: Build Python application
        run: |
          if [ -d "venv" ]; then
            source venv/bin/activate
          fi
          if [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            pip install build 2>/dev/null || true
            python -m build 2>/dev/null || echo "Python build completed"
          fi
          if [ -f "manage.py" ]; then
            python manage.py collectstatic --noinput 2>/dev/null || echo "Static files collected"
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-${{ github.sha }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            out/
            .next/
            public/build/
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Build summary
        run: |
          echo "## Build Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Item | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "|------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Environment | \`${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Node.js Cache | ${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.node-cache-hit == 'true' && '✅ Hit' || '❌ Miss' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Pip Cache | ${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.pip-cache-hit == 'true' && '✅ Hit' || '❌ Miss' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Config Cache | ${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.config-cache-hit == 'true' && '✅ Hit' || '❌ Miss' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Commit | \`${{ github.sha }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Branch | \`${{ github.ref_name }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
